channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: North Vancouver, BC, Canada
Description:

An internship opportunity is available for an Intern, Barge Operations & Logistics. This role involves assisting with barge transportation, marine logistics, and operational coordination. Responsibilities include supporting daily activities like scheduling and dispatch, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives, and assisting with safety management systems and operational compliance. The position requires an interest in marine transportation and logistics, strong analytical and communication skills, and the ability to work independently and collaboratively.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Intern, Barge Operations Job - Seaspan Marine at Seaspan Marine

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

A Service Engineer with Mechanical & Electrical knowledge of Ships Systems is sought for a marine engineering company. Experience with ICCP & MGPS is beneficial. The role involves worldwide travel on various vessel types including Cruise Ships, Private Yachts, Container Ships, and LNG Carriers. Salary is negotiable based on experience and travel areas. Contract lengths vary, with travel and accommodation covered. An immediate start is advantageous.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Service Engineer Job - Marine Industry at Chesterfield jobs, Derbyshire

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for Deck and Engine Officers and Ratings on Bulk Carrier and General Cargo vessels. Required positions include Master, Chief Officer, Second Officer, Third Engineer, Fourth Engineer, Able Seaman, and Oiler. Applicants must be Indonesian seafarers with at least 3-4 contracts in the same position and vessel type, possess valid documents with a minimum of 18 months validity, and have the latest BST (MSC 560). Good English communication is essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deck and Engine Officers/Ratings - Bulk Carrier General Cargo at kingsalmanmandiri.com

item.description:
Location: worldwide
Description:

Experienced Chief Officers, Captains, and Chief Engineers are sought for employment on container and bulk carrier vessels operating globally. This role offers a monthly salary exceeding $7,000. Opportunities are available for senior maritime professionals seeking high-paying contracts.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Senior Officer/Engineer Jobs on Container &amp; Bulk Carriers at Find Sea Jobs

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime job openings are available across various vessel types including VLGC/VLEC, Suezmax, VLCC, Crude Oil Tankers, Oil/Chemical Tankers, Bitumen Tankers, Oil Tankers, Bulk Carriers, Coastal Vessels, and Container Vessels. Open ranks include Master, Chief Officer, Second Officer, Third Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, Third Engineer, Fourth Engineer, ETO, Gas Engineer, Fitter, Oiler, Pumpman, Chief Cook, Messman, Bosun, and AB. Specific joining details, experience requirements, and HR contacts can be found by reviewing the provided banners.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Merchant Navy Job Openings - Various Ranks and Vessels at Merchant Navy Decoded Jobs

item.description:
Location: Varna, Bulgaria
Description:

Multiple qualified seafarers are sought for immediate deployment on bulk carriers. Open positions include Chief Officer, Second Officer, Third Engineer, Fourth Engineer, ETO, Bosun, Able Seaman, Ordinary Seaman, Oiler, Cook, Reefer Cadet, and Messman. Joining is in Varna, Bulgaria, around July 21, 2026. Salary packages vary by rank and experience, with Chief Officer up to USD 8,000 and Able Seaman up to USD 1,800. A valid visa for Bulgaria is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Vacancies on Bulk Carriers at Alkoc Group

item.description:
Location: Chesapeake, VA
Description:

Norfolk Naval Shipyard is seeking experienced skilled maritime trades, engineers, engineering technicians, and business agents for their 2026 Summer Job Fair. This event is for external hires, including transitioning service members, veterans, and military spouses. The job fair will take place on July 18, 2026, at the Chesapeake Conference Center in Chesapeake, VA. Hiring managers will be on-site to conduct interviews for various positions such as A/C Equipment Mechanic, Boilermakers, Civil Engineer, Crane Operator, Marine Electricians, Pipefitter, and more.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Skilled Trades Engineering Jobs - Naval Shipyard at Norfolk Naval Shipyard

item.description:
Location: foreign going
Description:

Able Seamen, Pumpman/Bosun, and Electro-Technical Officers are needed for oil tanker vessels (MR size and Aframax) with immediate joining. Minimum 1-2 years of experience in the same rank and vessel type is required, along with valid documents for at least 15 months. Specific certifications are needed for each role, including AOT/ACT and Crane Operator for Pumpman/Bosun. Fluency in English is essential for this foreign-going trading area position. The contract duration is 8 months. Experience with mixed nationalities is preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB, Pumpman/Bosun, ETO Jobs on Oil Tankers at PT. Topaz Maritime

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for several positions on Oil Tankers and Oil Product Tankers. Vacancies include Chief Officer, 2nd Engineer, 3rd Engineer, 4th Engineer, Able Seaman, Oiler, Cook, Fitter, and Pumpman. Applicants must be Indonesian seafarers with good English communication skills and a minimum of 3-4 contracts in a similar role and vessel type. Valid documents, including a BST with the latest version (MSC 560) and a minimum of 18 months validity, are required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Positions on Oil Tankers at kingsalmanmandiri.com

item.description:
Location: Coastal Europe
Description:

A crew is sought for a General Cargo vessel operating in Coastal Europe. Immediate joining is required. Candidates matching the specified classification will be processed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Vacancy on General Cargo Vessel at Wan Radya Hayatunnufus
